title: <div>  •  Connecting: Imagine your life story was being adapted into a novel or
content:
• Connecting: Imagine your life story was being adapted into a novel or film. What title would you give it, and why?
• Exploratory: How do revision and reflection help improve storytelling? Have you ever changed your perspective on an event after telling it multiple times?
context: From document: Week 2 | Writing Warm-Ups — chunk 3 (chunk 3/3)
